definition: The volatility of the correlation level itself may be more important than the correlation level for systematic strategy returns. Oscillation between -0.30 and +0.30 on 3-6 month frequency whipsaws vol-targeting strategies ($500B-$1T AUM) using 60-90 day lookback windows, with an estimated 15-25% Sharpe reduction.
evidence: Oscillating regime creates reflexive amplification loop via systematic rebalancing
Flagged as novel in pair_0 debate
Creates feedback between correlation regime and systematic positioning
open_questions: Magnitude estimate is constructed, not empirically calibrated
Limited empirical sample of oscillating regimes
Does the reflexive amplification create tradeable patterns?
